site.desc: A daily glimpse of Beijing's urban pulse

contact.error: Failed to send, please try again later
contact.hint: Tip: Messages go to Feishu bitable. Set FEISHU_CONTACT_TABLE_ID in .env.local

about.originDesc: One frame per day, capturing the pulse of Beijing's urban landscape. From hutongs to CBD, from sunrise to sunset, the lens captures the subtle changes happening every day in this city.
about.designDesc: The site adopts a cyberpunk visual style, with neon purple, circuit blue, and amber orange as the primary palette. CRT scanlines and glitch effects create an aesthetic contrast between futuristic tech and old Beijing's everyday life. Each street photo feels like a fragment of memory from the future.
about.equipmentDesc: Shot primarily on Xiaomi13, with minimal post-processing to preserve the authentic feel of each scene.
